Aries onwards.
8. Synonyms for Houses. Riksha, Rasi, Kshetra, Bha and Bhavana are identical names given to a
House by the sages.
9-10. Zodiacal Halves, their Lords and Effects. The Rasi Chakra with 12 Rasis is called Bhagana.
Six Signs counted from Leo to Capricorn consist of Solar Half and the Sun rules this Half-
Zodiac. Six Signs in the reverse order from Cancer to Aquarius are Lunar Half and ruled by
the Moon. Barring Cancer and Leo, planets from Mars to Saturn get one Rasi each in each
Half. If at birth more planets occupy the Solar Half, the native is brilliant and, if more planets
are in Lunar Half, he is soft, good and lucky.
11. The Rulers of Rasis and Navansas. Mars, Venus, Mercury, Moon, Sun, Mercury, Venus,
Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Saturn and Jupiter are the Lords, respectively, of Aries to Pisces. The
Navansas for these Rasis are calculated from Aries, Capricorn, Libra and Cancer in their
order.
